channel.title: Kirtan Soni — Writing
channel.description: Blog posts and notes by Kirtan Soni.

item.title: A résumé that compiles
item.description: Treating a one-page résumé like a software artifact — content as data, layout as code, a renderer, and a linter that measures how well every line is used.

item.title: Meet Forge — context management for AI agent harnesses
item.description: A git-like CLI that gives AI agents a senior engineer's memory of your codebase — automatically, incrementally, and always in sync.

item.title: 13 words, 25 attempts, and a deadlock at 1 a.m.
item.description: Word Weave — a word game where you steer a streaming GPT-3.5 completion toward a quote you're never allowed to type. Prototyped at 2:44 a.m., deadlocked the first time someone won, rewritten five weeks after its "final prod version" into a single Go binary.

item.title: I built a medical records system with no edit button
item.description: Ortho Diary — clinical records for one orthopaedic surgeon, where every form is 195 lines of JSON, a saved visit can only be amended (never edited), and Claude reads discharge PDFs without ever getting write access.

item.title: The family jewelry ERP learned to chat in one night
item.description: Xeno Chat — built in one overnight session on May 12: a LangGraph agent over my family's retail SQL Server that answers plain-English questions, draws charts mid-conversation, shows its running cost in rupees, and grades its own answers every morning.

item.title: A GPU in my closet reads job postings now
item.description: Automata — a daily pipeline that scrapes Microsoft, Nvidia, and Apple postings, asks a local 3B model one question about each, and only pings my phone when the answer is good.

item.title: ServeMux never forgets — a 430-line reverse proxy you reconfigure by typing at it
item.description: I wanted every side project behind one domain without ever editing a config file, so I wrote a Go reverse proxy whose route table is edited from the server's own stdin. Go's ServeMux refused to forget a route, and autocert made my best-tested package redundant.

item.title: Forwarding Streaming Response in Real-Time
item.description: How to forward an HTTP/1.1 chunked streaming response through a proxy server in real time, in Go.

item.title: PyApply — GenAI App for the automation of job Applications
item.description: PyApply, a CLI tool that automates job applications and generates AI cover letters.

item.title: Display currently playing Song with Spotipy API in Flask
item.description: Using the Spotipy API in Flask to display the song your Spotify account is currently playing.
